mission.title: vault: PATCH API needed for updating multiple secrets stored at a single URI path
mission.description: PATCH API needed for updating multiple secrets stored at a single URI path. Requested by 34+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
Currently, Vault does not have any PATCH API for updating single fields when storing multiple fields at a given URI path.  A common use case is to just update a single value.

steps.title: Enable KV v2 and use the PATCH operation
steps.description:
Vault added HTTP PATCH support for the KV v2 secrets engine (PR #12687, merged October 2021). To use it, ensure KV v2 is enabled and use the PATCH method to update individual fields:
```bash
# Enable KV v2 if not already enabled
vault secrets enable -version=2 kv
# Use vault kv patch to update a single field without overwriting others
vault kv patch kv/myapp dbhost=newhost
```

steps.title: Upgrade vault to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade vault:
```bash
# Check current version
vault version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "PATCH API needed for updating multiple secrets stored at a…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Vault implemented HTTP PATCH support for the KV v2 secrets engine in PR #12687 (merged October 2021). This allows users to update individual fields at a given secret path without overwriting the entire secret. The `vault kv patch` CLI command and the HTTP PATCH method on the KV v2 API enable partial updates.
codeSnippets:
# vault write /secret/php/dbhost value=xxx 
# vault write /secret/php/dbpass value=yyy 
# vault write /secret/php/dbuser value=www
# vault write /secret/php/dbname value=zzz

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
